title: Q2 ATAM review — order-service platform
systemContext: Order service handles checkout, payment authorization, and order lifecycle. Split into API, workflow engine, and projections DB.
businessDrivers: Support 2x peak on Black Friday without manual capacity bumps.
constraints: Cannot change payment vendor in this cycle.
Must stay inside current Postgres instance class.
assumptions: Peak traffic is 3x baseline for at most 6 hours.

approaches.name: Async workflow with retries
approaches.description: Durable queue between API and workflow engine for backpressure.

scenarios.responseMeasure: 0 lost orders, < 5 min delay once vendor recovers

findings.description: Single Postgres writer is a bottleneck at 3x load.
Retry-with-jitter parameters are sensitive for availability at peak.
Throughput vs. consistency: async workflow trades eventual order state visibility for capacity.
Read throughput via projections is already headroom-healthy.
